TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O Sin'gedelutu (Holam: 新各的旅途, ira ko ) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2013 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^ Lalao Layis Pai Ping-ping
S.PHON: o~u sinʡ*əɬ~ɮəɾo~u~uto~u~u (ħo~uɾam: *****, ira ko~u ) ʦaʦəj kamo~uko~uʡaj a tiɾifi ə*a i tajwan. misaŋaʡ pipaħo~uso~uan to~u tiɾifi no~u jən-ʦo~u~u-min ʦi ina to~u tiɾifi ə*a. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u **** a miħəʦa. mianiŋaja a patiŋso~uʔ ɾaɾao~u ɾajis pai piŋ-piŋ
S.FORM: O Sin'gedelutu (Holam: 新各的旅途, ira ko ) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2013 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^ Lalao Layis Pai Ping-ping
S.PHON: o~u sinʡ*əɬ~ɮəɾo~u~uto~u~u (ħo~uɾam: *****, ira ko~u ) ʦaʦəj kamo~uko~uʡaj a tiɾifi ə*a i tajwan. misaŋaʡ pipaħo~uso~uan to~u tiɾifi no~u jən-ʦo~u~u-min ʦi ina to~u tiɾifi ə*a. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u **** a miħəʦa. mianiŋaja a patiŋso~uʔ ɾaɾao~u ɾajis pai piŋ-piŋ
